title: FBCloak Re-engagement
description: Browser-automated re-engagement for fanpage inboxes older than 7 days.
killswitchActive: Killswitch is active — fbcloak operations are disabled.
checkpointBanner: A checkpoint was detected on at least one credential. Review status before next run.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.empty: No credentials yet. Add a fanpage cookie set to get started.
credentials.confirmDelete: Delete this credential? Existing jobs will fail until reassigned.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.empty: No jobs configured. Create one to schedule re-engagement runs.
jobs.runNowConfirm: Run this job now? It will execute outside its cron schedule but still respects daily cap and working hours.
jobs.confirmDelete: Delete this job and its send log? This action cannot be undone.
jobs.dryRunOffWarning: Live mode is OFF dry-run. Real messages will be sent. Confirm you have the user's consent.

edit_dialog.name: Name
edit_dialog.dailyCapHint: Max sends per day; hard-capped at 50 server-side.
edit_dialog.useScannerFallback: Use DOM inbox scanner as fallback
edit_dialog.scannerFallbackHint: Fallback scanner runs when fbbackfill data has no matching targets. Slower, more brittle.
edit_dialog.dryRunHint: Default ON. Messages are NOT sent — only logged.
edit_dialog.enabledHint: Disabled jobs do not run. Enable after acknowledging the disclaimer.

disclaimer.title: Re-engagement disclaimer
disclaimer.intro: FBCloak browser automation runs outside of Meta's official APIs. By using it, you accept the following risks:
disclaimer.checkbox1: I understand this feature may violate Meta's Terms of Service.
disclaimer.checkbox2: I understand my page may be restricted or my admin account may be locked.
disclaimer.checkbox3: I will use this feature under my own responsibility and have the recipient's consent.
disclaimer.needAck: Acknowledge the disclaimer to enable jobs.

dualMode.cloakReason: min idle > 7 days — Cloak browser path

plans.title: Engagement plans (AI)
plans.description: AI reads each customer's chat history → decides if and when to send a care message and what to say.
plans.empty: No plans yet. Click 'Generate now' to start.
plans.confirmGenerate: Generate plans for this fanpage now? This consumes LLM tokens.
plans.confirmCancel: Cancel this plan? Cannot be undone.
plans.confirmRunDue: Run all due plans now? Real messages will be sent (NOT dry-run).
